prompt: I have a Dart Bank statement for March 2026 with all my Portal42 client payments. It's at /Statements/Business-You/Banks/Dart-Bank-2026-03.csv. Please process it, match transactions to unpaid FreshBooks invoices, and give me a report of what was marked paid vs. what needs review.

assertions.text: FreshBooks matching algorithm - Implements amount + dispensary name matching
assertions.evidence: Both with-skill and without-skill outputs describe matching algorithm; with-skill provides integration-ready code

assertions.text: Three-category report - Correctly categorizes into matched/ambiguous/unmatched
assertions.evidence: Sample reports show proper categorization with confidence scores
With-skill defines explicit thresholds; without-skill implements equivalent scoring

assertions.text: Actionable recommendations - Clear guidance on manual review vs. auto-marking
assertions.evidence: Reports include recommendations; with-skill provides more structured guidance

assertions.text: Time savings - Significant automation vs. manual reconciliation
assertions.evidence: With-skill: 75-85% time savings (45-60 min vs. 4-6 hours); without-skill: 30-40% savings
